parsed.production_notes: The advertisement primarily uses human-recorded, live-action footage of actors in a real-world setting. However, it incorporates a screen recording of a mobile application which features a digitally-rendered AI avatar, making it a mixed-media production.

characters.appearance: A South Indian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a warm, medium complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair parted in the middle, and a red bindi on her forehead. She has a friendly, smiling expression.
characters.wardrobe: A traditional saree with a royal blue body, a turquoise green inner layer, and an orange and gold patterned border (pallu). She wears gold-colored traditional bell-shaped earrings (jhumkas).

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early 20s with a fair complexion and a slim build. She has long, straight, dark brown hair parted on the side. She has delicate facial features.
characters.wardrobe: A casual dark navy blue sleeveless top and dark blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially focused and learning, then becomes friendly, confident, and helpful when explaining the app.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his early 20s with a medium build and a light brown complexion. He has short, styled black hair and wears black-rimmed glasses. He has a light beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: A casual, short-sleeved, light brown or beige t-shirt with some small text on the chest, paired with dark jeans.

characters.appearance: A woman in her mid-20s with a fair complexion. She has long, straight, dark brown hair parted in the middle. She has a neutral, professional expression.
characters.wardrobe: A light purple or lavender-colored turtleneck top.

scenes.setting: The bottom panel is set in a modern cafe with olive green walls, wooden tables, and woven-back chairs. The top panel has a neutral indoor background with light-colored curtains.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A. She is smiling warmly at the camera. The background is softly out of focus, showing light-colored vertical curtains. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her features.

A medium shot of Character B sitting at a wooden table in a cafe. She is holding a black smartphone in her left hand, looking at the screen and speaking. On the table in front of her is a white bowl with food. In the background, another male patron is visible sitting at a different table, out of focus. The cafe has olive green walls.

scenes.visual_description: A vertically split screen. The top panel shows a smiling woman (Character A) in a saree. The bottom panel shows a young woman (Character B) in a cafe, speaking to her phone. Text captions appear sequentially in the bottom panel, first showing broken English, then Telugu, then correct English. An AI voice says 'Very good' at the end.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: I Pooja. I Chennai. I doing hard working person.

AI Voice says: నా పేరు పూజ. నేను చెన్నై నుండి వచ్చాను మరియు నేను కష్టపడి పనిచేసే వ్యక్తిని. [My name is Pooja. I came from Chennai and I am a hardworking person.]

Character B says: My name is Pooja, I am from Chennai, I am a hardworking person.

AI Voice says: Very good.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I Pooja
I Chennai
I doing hard working person.
Naa peru Pooja
nenu Chennai nundi vachanu
mariyu nenu kashtapadi
panichese vyaktini.
My name is Pooja,
I am from Chennai,
I am a hardworking person.
Very good.

scenes.setting: A modern cafe with olive green walls, wooden tables, and woven-back chairs. There are posters and a decorative guitar on the wall.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, transitioning to over-the-shoulder shots.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C approaches Character B, who is sitting at her table in the cafe. He stands next to her table and begins to speak to her. Character B looks up from her phone, surprised, to listen to him. The camera angle shifts during their conversation, showing different perspectives of the two characters interacting in the cafe environment.

scenes.visual_description: Character C walks up to Character B's table in the cafe and starts a conversation. Subtitles in Telugu appear at the bottom of the screen corresponding to their dialogue. The brand logo for 'SpeakX' appears on the wall behind Character B as she mentions the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Hi, nenu ippude meeru English nerchukovadam chusanu. Actually naa English kuda chala weak eh. ee app nundi English nerchukovachha? [Hi, I just saw you learning English. Actually, my English is also very weak. Can I learn English from this app?]

Character B says: Naa English kuda chala weak ga undedi, anduke daily nenu SpeakX app lo English practice chestunnanu. [My English was also very weak, that's why I practice English daily on the SpeakX app.]

Character C says: SpeakX app? Adenti? [SpeakX app? What is that?]

Character B says: idi oka AI English teaching app. [This is an AI English teaching app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hi,
nenu ippude meeru English
nerchukovadam chusanu.
Actually naa English kuda chala weak
app nundi English nerchukovachha?
Naa English kuda
weak ga undi,
anduke daily nenu
SpeakX app lo
English practice chestunnanu.
SpeakX app
idi oka AI English teaching app.

scenes.setting: A person is holding a smartphone, likely in a home setting with a patterned couch visible in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a person's hands holding a smartphone. The thumb scrolls through a list-based interface on the screen. The screen then transitions to show a video feed of Character D, an AI tutor, against a plain white background. She looks directly at the camera as if addressing the user.

scenes.visual_description: A screen recording of the SpeakX app. A finger scrolls through lesson options like 'Daily English', 'Vocabulary', 'Read with me', and 'Grammar'. It then shows the AI tutor interface with Character D. Voiceover from Character B explains the feature, with corresponding Telugu subtitles on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Ikkada AI teachers neeku English practice chepinchi, English ela matladalo nerpistaru. [Here, AI teachers make you practice English and teach you how to speak English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
idi oka AI English teaching app.
Ikkada AI teachers neeku English
Practice chepinchi
English ela matladalo nerpistaru.

scenes.setting: The same modern cafe from the previous scenes.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, alternating between over-the-shoulder perspectives.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B and Character C continue their conversation in the cafe. Character B is seated, gesturing as she explains the app's features. Character C stands and listens intently, occasionally asking questions. Their expressions are engaged and friendly. The camera cuts between different angles, focusing on each speaker.

scenes.visual_description: The conversation between Character B and Character C continues in the cafe. They discuss the app's non-judgmental nature, the time commitment, cost, and trial period. Telugu subtitles appear on screen for the dialogue. The scene ends with Character C thanking Character B and deciding to download the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Adi kuda emi judge cheyakunda, human teachers laga. [That too, without any judgment, like human teachers.]

Character C says: Kani deeniki chala time padutundi kada? [But this will take a lot of time, right?]

Character B says: Ledu, roz ke 15-20 minutes ee app lo practice chey, 15 to 20 days lo meeru English fluent ga matladataru. Already naa friends andaru fluent aipoyaru. nenu kuda konni rojullo fluent aipotanu. [No, practice for 15-20 minutes daily on this app, and in 15 to 20 days you will speak English fluently. All my friends are already fluent. I will also become fluent in a few days.]

Character C says: Kani idi chala costly untundi kada? [But this must be very costly, right?]

Character B says: Assalu kaadu, rojuki 4 rupees matrame, 7 days trial kuda theeskovachu. [Not at all, it's only 4 rupees per day, you can also take a 7-day trial.]

Character C says: Idi naku munde enduku teliyaledu? nenu ippude SpeakX app ni download chestanu. Thank you. [Why didn't I know this before? I will download the SpeakX app right now. Thank you.]
